ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "rec_id" TEXT /* Record ID for the person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the person */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the person (optional) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the person */,
  "primary_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary address of the person */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the person */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the person */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the person */,
  "emergency_contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to an emergency contact person */,
  "is_employee" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the person is an employee */,
  "is_client" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the person is a client */,
  "is_partner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the person is a partner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the person (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_primary_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_emergency_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("emergency_contact_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., residential, postal, alternative) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "pobox" TEXT /* PO Box number (if applicable) */,
  "pocitystatezip" TEXT /* PO City, State, ZIP (if applicable) */,
  "primary_address" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary address for the person */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address for geolocation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the address record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the address record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_address_type FOREIGN KEY ("address_type") REFERENCES address_types ("address_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_types" (
  "address_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address type */,
  "address_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the address type (e.g., residential, postal, alternative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the address type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the address type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the address type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_methods" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact method */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person the contact method belongs to */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of the contact method (e.g., email, phone, fax) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact method (e.g., email address, phone number) */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary contact method for the person */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for phone numbers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the contact method */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the contact method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_methods_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_methods_contact_type FOREIGN KEY ("contact_type") REFERENCES contact_types ("contact_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "contact_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "contact_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type (e.g., email, phone, fax) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the contact type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the contact type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the contact type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_records" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the employee works for */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employment (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Details of the benefits provided to the employee */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the employment record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the employment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_records_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_records_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact person for the company */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Main phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address of the company */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the company record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the company record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_records" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the client's account */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the client record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the client record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_records_account_type FOREIGN KEY ("account_type") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_records_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the account type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person the user represents */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the PIMS */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person whose record was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., fields changed, old and new values) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person the attachment belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., ID, passport, tax return) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the document is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the document attachment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the document attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_attachments_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
